desc: ClashManagerNavigateToResultInActiveViewCommand — snap a 3D section box around a clash pair and show the elements.
summary: ClashManagerNavigateToResultInActiveViewCommand — snap a 3D section box around a clash pair and show the elements.
precondition: Resolver_ClashId resolvable; clash pair still in the model; a 3D view exists.
postcondition: Active view becomes a 3D view with a section box around the pair; selection set to the two ids.
logictree:
1) Resolver_ClashId required; load ClashRecord.
2) Resolve UidA + UidB in doc; WireError on missing.
3) View3D = current if it's a View3D; else pick first non-template View3D. If none, WireError.
4) Call Create3DSectionBox.FromElements(doc, view3d, [a,b], margin_ft).
5) uidoc.ActiveView = view3d; uidoc.ShowElements([a.Id, b.Id]); uidoc.Selection.SetElementIds([a.Id, b.Id]).
6) Emit ok + view_id + element_ids.

preprompts: Navigating to clash pair in active view…
